form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months won by 1.5 len at this track Bm60 March 29 over 1000m in soft going defeating Conformity carrying 56kg at $21. Previously second-up second last of 12 at Beaudesert Bm62 on August 16 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Petite Palace carrying 57.5kg at $26. Strips fitter and a bold showing is expected.

form.formComment: Half-brother to dual-Group 1 winner Converge. Second run back. First-up after two months ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 8 at Ipswich Cg&E Bm62 on March 14 over 1100m, 1.4 len behind He's For The Girls carrying 57.5kg at $15. Previously second-up 5th of 8 at Gatton Bm60 on October 16 over 860m, 3 len behind Dawyn's Choice with 58.5kg at $71. Fitter and is sure to be thereabouts.
